scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,WORKER,DASH,CARDS" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green,yellow" --kill-others-on-fail "cd calendar-backend && pnpm dev" "cd calendar-backend && pnpm dev:worker" "cd calendar-frontend && pnpm dev" "cd cards-frontend && pnpm dev:clean"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently --names "API,WORKER,DASH,CARDS" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green,yellow" --kill-others-on-fail "cd calendar-backend && pnpm dev" "cd calendar-backend && pnpm dev:worker" "cd calendar-frontend && pnpm dev" "cd cards-frontend && pnpm dev:clean"
scripts.install:all: cd calendar-backend && pnpm install && cd ../calendar-frontend && pnpm install && cd ../cards-frontend && pnpm install
scripts.build:all: cd calendar-backend && pnpm build && cd ../calendar-frontend && pnpm build && cd ../cards-frontend && pnpm build
scripts.lint:all: cd calendar-backend && pnpm lint && cd ../calendar-frontend && pnpm lint && cd ../cards-frontend && pnpm lint
